Package egovframework.let.cop.com.service

Class UserInfVO

java.lang.Object
egovframework.let.cop.com.service.UserInfVO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UserInfVO extends Object implements Serializable

2009.04.06
Version:
1.0
Author:
